Parameter info tooltip

Matched overload background blend base. Default is green. Should match with ParameterInfo.mismatchedParameterBackgroundBase, which by default is red. The color is blended onto ParameterInfo.background using ParameterInfo.matchedOverloadBackgroundOpacity.
Matched overload opacity percentage in range 0 - 100. It is used to control how much should ParameterInfo.currentOverloadBackgroundBase color blend with the ParameterInfo.background color.

Mismatched parameter background blend base. Default is red. Should match with ParameterInfo.matchedOverloadBackgroundBase, which by default is green. The color is blended onto ParameterInfo.background using ParameterInfo.mismatchedParameterBackgroundOpacity.

Mismatched parameter background opacity percentage in range 0 - 100. It is used to control how much should ParameterInfo.mismatchedParameterBackgroundBase color blend with the ParameterInfo.background color.
Opacity percentage in range 0 - 100. It is used to control how opaque should non-matching signature be.
Opacity percentage in range 0 - 100. It is used to control how opaque should parameter default values be.
Opacity percentage in range 0 - 100. It is used to control how opaque should a not current parameter be. A current parameter is that under the cursor and it has 100% opacity.
